leadText: Relic Song (Japanese: いにしえのうた Ancient Song) is a damage-dealing Normal-type move introduced in Generation V. It is the signature move of Meloetta.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Generation V 1.2 Generation VI onwards 1.3 Generation VIII 1.3.1 Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl 1.4 Generation IX Effect [ edit | edit source ] Relic Song deals damage and has a 10% chance of putting the target to sleep . Relic Song hits all adjacent opponents. Relic Song is a sound-based move . If successfully used by Meloetta (affecting at least one Pokémon), it will also cause Meloetta to change between its Aria and Pirouette Formes , changing its type , base stats , and EV yield . However, if Meloetta's Ability is changed to Sheer Force , Sheer Force removes Relic Song's form-changing effect. Generation V [ edit | edit source ] If used on a Pokémon behind a substitute , it hits that Pokémon's substitute. Generation VI onwards [ edit | edit source ] Relic Song can now hit Pokémon even if they are behind a substitute. Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl [ edit | edit source ] Relic Song cannot be selected in a battle. Generation IX [ edit | edit source ] If Meloetta Terastallizes , the type-changing effect of Relic Song will be nullified.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description B W B2 W2 The user sings an ancient song and attacks by appealing to the hearts of those listening. It may also induce sleep. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh LA S V The user sings an ancient song and attacks by appealing to the hearts of the listening opposing Pokémon. This may also induce sleep. BD SP This move can't be used. It's recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can't be remembered. ZA The user attacks with an ancient song that strikes the hearts of its targets as it charmingly dances out of the way of attacks. This may also make targets drowsy.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD GtI It could induce sleep, making the target unable to move for a while. * It damages even a faraway Pokémon. It could also cause the Sleep status condition. It influences a certain Pokémon's appearance. * S MD It could induce sleep, making the enemy unable to move for a while. * It damages even a faraway Pokémon. It could also make the enemy sleep. It influences a certain Pokémon's appearance. *

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Although Meloetta did not appear in said episodes, it singing the Relic Song was used as background music during Party Dancecapades! and That's Why the Litten is a Scamp! . A remastering of the song that appeared in Meloetta's Moonlight Serenade has also been featured throughout Pokémon the Series: XY and Pokémon the Series: Sun & Moon .
